name: boschrpamagicbox

metadata.name: BoschRpaMagicBox
metadata.summary: This package is used for building automation functions for rpa within Bosch

documentation:
# BoschRpaMagicBox

This package is used for building common automation functions for sap web gui within Bosch

functions.name: BoschRpaMagicBox.smb_functions.smb_copy_file_local_to_remote
documentation:
This function is used to copy local file to public folder

Args:
    username(str): This is the username
    password(str): This is the password
    server_name(str):This is the server name (url), e.g. szh0fs06.apac.bosch.com
    share_name(str): This is the share_name of public folder, e.g. GS_ACC_CN$
    local_file_path(str): This is the local file path
    remote_file_path(str): This is the public file path that file will be saved under share name folder
    port(int): This is the port number of the server name

functions.name: BoschRpaMagicBox.smb_functions.smb_store_remote_file_by_obj
documentation:
This function is used to store file to public folder

Args:
    file_obj(io.BytesIO): This is the file object
    username(str): This is the username
    password(str): This is the password
    server_name(str):This is the server name (url), e.g. szh0fs06.apac.bosch.com
    share_name(str): This is the share_name of public folder, e.g. GS_ACC_CN$
    remote_file_path(str): This is the public file path that file will be saved under share name folder
    port(int): This is the port number of the server name

functions.name: BoschRpaMagicBox.data_process_functions.strip_str_column
documentation:
This function is used to strip columns in str type

Args:
    upper_column(list): This is the dict that indicates which column need to be transferred into upper format
    pd_data(pd.DataFrame): This is the instance of pandas DataFrame data
    str_column_list(list):This is the list of column in str type

Returns:
    pd.DataFrame: pd_data

functions.name: BoschRpaMagicBox.data_process_functions.load_excel_data
documentation:
This function is used to transform config data into target format

Args:
    auto_locate_header(bool): This indicates whether to locate the row index of header row
    key_header_column(str): This is the column which will be used to locate header row
    replace_na(bool): Whether to replace na value with given value
    replace_na_value(str): This is the value to fill na range
    header(int): This is the header number of DataFrame data
    file_path(str): This is the file path of Excel file
    sheet_name(str): This is the name of sheet that contains data
    upper_column_list(list): This is the columns whose values need to be in upper format
    to_dict(bool): This is the flag whether transfer data into dict format
    data_index(str): This is the column that will be index column when data need to be transferred into dict format
    used_cols(list): This is the list of column names which will be used for usecols parameter

functions.name: BoschRpaMagicBox.data_process_functions.load_sap_text_data
documentation:
This function is used to load data from txt file

Args:
    replace_na(bool): This indicates whether to fill NAN value
    replace_na_value(str): This is the value to fill NAN value
    file_path(str): This is the text file path
    dtype(dict | type): This is dtype which will be read as string
    key_word(str): This is the key word to locate column header
    remove_unname(bool): This is the flag whether delete column with 'Unname'
    error_log_folder_path(str): This is the path to record error log

Returns:
    dict: load_result

methods.name: BoschRpaMagicBox.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.initial_browser
documentation:
This function is used to initial FireFox browser

Args:

    has_proxy(bool): This is whether to use proxy when open browser
    proxy_area(str): This is the proxy setting for network.proxy.autoconfig_url

    is_headless(bool): This indicates whether to use headless mode to execute automation task
    timeout(int): This is the timeout setting

Returns:

def copy_paste_values_by_file(self, value_list: list):
"""This function is used to copy and paste values by uploading file
Args:
value_list(list): This is the values need to be input
nt_account = getpass.getuser()
current_time = str(datetime.datetime.now()).replace('-', '').replace(' ', '').replace(':', '').replace('.', '')
temp_file_path = fr'C:\Users\{nt_account}\Documents\{current_time}.txt'
value_list = [item for item in value_list if item.strip()]
paste_values = '\r\n'.join(value_list)
with open(temp_file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as upload_file:
upload_file.write(paste_values)
sleep(2)
self.press_keyboard_shortcut([Keys.SHIFT, Keys.F11])
self.wait_element_presence_by_css_selector("#UpDownDialogChoose")
sleep(1)
self.click_or_input_by_css_selector("#UpDownDialogChoose", 'click')
sleep(1)
self.wait_com_window_pop_up('#32770', 'File Upload')
self.process_file_upload_com_window('#32770', 'File Upload', temp_file_path)
sleep(3)
self.wait_invisibility_of_loading_window()
sleep(1)
return temp_file_path

documentation:
Args:
    case_sensitive(bool): This indicates whether to consider the upper and lower case of text
    check_method(str): This is the method to check target text.  e.g. equal, contain, startswith, endswith
    text_tag(str): This is the status which is used to describe situation or result when target text occurs
    target_text(str): This is the target text to detect
    text_css_selector(str): This is the css selector of text element
    after_text_css_selector(str): This is the css selector of element if there is no target text
    has_screenshot(bool): Whether to save screenshot when target text occurs
    screenshot_folder_path(str): This is the folder path of screenshot when target text occurs
    screenshot_file_name_tag(str):This is the first part file name of screenshot
    name_format(str): This indicates whether user date or datetime to name screenshot

methods.name: BoschRpaMagicBox.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.check_window_switch_status
documentation:
This function is used to check whether there are temp elements before loading target element

Args:
    has_screenshot(bool): Whether to save screenshot when there is an error window popping up
    screenshot_folder_path(str): This is the folder path of screenshot when there is an error occurred
    target_css_selector(str): This is the selector whose occurrence indicates data is loaded successfully
    before_target_css_selector(str): This is the selector whose occurrence indicates that there is temp element
    before loading target element
    name_format(str): This indicates whether user date or datetime to name screenshot
    screenshot_file_name_tag(str):This is the first part file name of screenshot

methods.name: BoschRpaMagicBox.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.check_data_load_status
documentation:
This function is used to check whether there are errors when loading data by clicking execution button

Args:
    has_screenshot(bool): Whether to save screenshot when there is an error window popping up
    screenshot_folder_path(str): This is the folder path of screenshot when there is an error occurred
    success_css_selector(str): This is the selector whose occurrence indicates data loaded successfully
    error_css_selector(str): This is the selector whose occurrence indicates that there is an error or no data
    name_format(str): This indicates whether user date or datetime to name screenshot
    screenshot_file_name_tag(str):This is the first part file name of screenshot

methods.name: BoschRpaMagicBox.common_functions.WebSapCommonFunctions.wait_file_upload_confirmation_dialog
documentation: This function is used to wait file upload confirmation dialog window and click ok button

documentation: This function is used to quit browser
This class is used to design web sap common functions across different t-codes

functions.name: BoschRpaMagicBox.remote_excel_functions.create_excel_file
documentation:
This function is used to create an Excel file.

Args:

    username(str): This is the username
    password(str): This is the password
    server_name(str):This is the server name (url), e.g. szh0fs06.apac.bosch.com
    share_name(str): This is the share_name of public folder, e.g. GS_ACC_CN$
    remote_file_path(str): This is the public file path that file will be saved under share name folder
    port(int): This is the port number of the server name
    sheet_name(str): The name of the sheet.

    sheet_name(str): The name of the sheet.

documentation:
Args:

functions.name: BoschRpaMagicBox.remote_excel_functions.save_dataframe_into_excel
documentation:
This function is used to save data in Dataframe format to an Excel file.

Args:
    username(str): This is the username
    password(str): This is the password
    server_name(str):This is the server name (url), e.g. szh0fs06.apac.bosch.com
    share_name(str): This is the share_name of public folder, e.g. GS_ACC_CN$
    remote_file_path(str): This is the public file path that file will be saved under share name folder
    port(int): This is the port number of the server name
    sheet_name(str): The name of the sheet.
    keep_header(bool): Whether to keep the header of the data.
    start_cell_location(str): The location of start cell. e.g. A1
    saved_data(pd.DataFrame): The data to be saved.
    auto_filter(bool): Whether to add column filter.
    auto_column_width(bool): Whether to auto set column width.

functions.name: BoschRpaMagicBox.remote_excel_functions.save_series_into_excel
documentation:
This function is used to save data in Series or list format to an Excel file.

Args:

    username(str): This is the username
    password(str): This is the password
    server_name(str):This is the server name (url), e.g. szh0fs06.apac.bosch.com
    share_name(str): This is the share_name of public folder, e.g. GS_ACC_CN$
    remote_file_path(str): This is the public file path that file will be saved under share name folder
    port(int): This is the port number of the server name
    sheet_name(str): The name of the sheet.
    start_cell_location(str): The location of start cell. e.g. A1
    saved_data(pd.Series | list): The data to be saved.
    auto_filter(bool): Whether to add column filter.
    auto_column_width(bool): Whether to auto set column width.

functions.name: BoschRpaMagicBox.remote_excel_functions.save_single_value_into_excel
documentation:
This function is used to save single value to an Excel file.

Args:

    username(str): This is the username
    password(str): This is the password
    server_name(str):This is the server name (url), e.g. szh0fs06.apac.bosch.com
    share_name(str): This is the share_name of public folder, e.g. GS_ACC_CN$
    remote_file_path(str): This is the public file path that file will be saved under share name folder
    port(int): This is the port number of the server name
    sheet_name(str): The name of the sheet.
    target_cell_location(str): The location of target cell. e.g. A1
    saved_data(str|int|float): The data to be saved.
    auto_filter(bool): Whether to add column filter.
    auto_column_width(bool): Whether to auto set column width.

functions.name: BoschRpaMagicBox.remote_excel_functions.save_multiple_value_into_excel
documentation:
This function is used to save multiple values to an Excel file.

Args:

    username(str): This is the username
    password(str): This is the password
    server_name(str):This is the server name (url), e.g. szh0fs06.apac.bosch.com
    share_name(str): This is the share_name of public folder, e.g. GS_ACC_CN$

    sheet_name(str): The name of the sheet.
    saved_data(dict): The data to be saved.e.g. {'A1': 1, 'B2': 2}

functions.name: BoschRpaMagicBox.remote_excel_functions.append_flexible_dataframe_into_excel
documentation:
This function is used to append data in DataFrame format to an Excel file.

Args:

    username(str): This is the username
    password(str): This is the password
    server_name(str):This is the server name (url), e.g. szh0fs06.apac.bosch.com
    share_name(str): This is the share_name of public folder, e.g. GS_ACC_CN$
    remote_file_path(str): This is the public file path that file will be saved under share name folder
    port(int): This is the port number of the server name
    sheet_name(str): The name of the sheet.
    saved_data(pd.Dataframe): The data to be saved.
    column_name_dict(dict): The dictionary of column name and column index. e.g. {'name':'A', 'age':'C'}
    auto_filter(bool): Whether to add column filter.
    auto_column_width(bool): Whether to auto set column width.

functions.name: BoschRpaMagicBox.remote_excel_functions.copy_worksheet
documentation:
This function is used to copy a worksheet to another worksheet.

Args:
    username(str): This is the username.
    password(str): This is the password.
    server_name(str): The server name (URL).
    share_name(str): The share name of the public folder.
    source_file_path(str): The public file path for the source.
    target_file_path(str): The public file path for the target.
    port(int): The port number of the server name.
    source_sheet_name(str): The name of the source sheet.
    target_sheet_name(str): The name of the target sheet.

functions.name: BoschRpaMagicBox.remote_excel_functions.update_cell_value_alignment
documentation:
This function is used to update the alignment of the cell value.

Args:

    horizontal_alignment(str): The horizontal alignment of the cell value. e.g. center, left, right
    vertical_alignment(str): The vertical alignment of the cell value. e.g. center, top, bottom
    worksheet(Worksheet): This is the instance of Worksheet
    cell_start_location(str): The start location of the cell. e.g. A1
    cell_end_location(str): The end location of the cell. e.g. A1
